summary: Completed first end-to-end frontend test of Heartbound: The Hero Within. All 10 requested feature flows passed: title screen + buttons, character creation, chapter map (23 nodes/cards with locked 6-23), Chapter 1 narration + HUD + Phaser canvas + Mirror Lens (M) + Journal (J), Chapter 3 Tara dialogue with 4 choices and choice-honest auto-navigating to /journal/3, journal save + skip + localStorage persistence (key 'heartbound.save.v1'), threshold screen after journal/5, continue button enabled after save and navigating to /game/<currentChapter>. Backend not tested per request.
critical_code_review_comments: Map node SVG <g> elements with data-testid=map-node-N: Playwright's default center-of-bounding-box click hits the empty <g> region and the parent <svg> intercepts pointer events. Real users click the visible circle which bubbles up to <g> onClick, so this is not a user-facing bug; however to make automated testing easier, consider attaching the click handler directly to the inner <circle> or making the <g> have a transparent fillable rect over the node. Worked when using force=True in tests.
useGameStore.js: completeChapter sets currentChapter to id+1 capped at 23 - looks correct. defaultState.mirrorLensUnlocked=true is fine. No backend dependency. Good separation.
GameScreen.jsx: useDialogueSequencer is ~150 LoC inline inside the file; could be extracted to /hooks for readability. File is ~330 lines (within limit).
TARA_CHOICE_BLOCK uses TARA_DIALOGUE[length-1].choice — fragile if chapters.js ordering changes. Consider a named constant for the choice block.

GameScreen mount effect calls gameStore.set({currentChapter: id}) on every chapter visit — that resets currentChapter even when player is just revisiting a completed chapter. Generally OK but may produce subtle journal/continue-button behavior surprises (Continue then jumps to revisited chapter, not actual furthest).
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes; design is intentionally dim per problem statement (not a bug).
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage manipulation only to simulate completed chapters 1-5 for threshold/continue verification (no backend seeding).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP flows verified working at https://threshold-awakens-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Use force=True with playwright when clicking map-node-N SVG <g> elements (or use the equivalent map-card-N buttons). Chapter 3 dialogue path requires ~30 click advances on dialogue-box before choices appear. localStorage key is 'heartbound.save.v1'. M key toggles mirror lens; J key opens journal. Threshold reached via /journal/5 save or skip.
verified_flows: Title screen renders with start/continue/chapter-map buttons; continue disabled when no save
Begin -> /character -> preset-mira + accent-ember + name input + enter-antara -> /map
Map shows 23 nodes + 23 cards; cards 6+ disabled (locked); cards 1-5 enabled
map-node-1 click navigates to /game/1 (force=True needed for SVG hit-test)
Phaser canvas host, HUD elements (heart-lantern-meter, mirror-lens-button, journal-button, back-to-map-button) all visible
Ch1 narration dialogue appears with 'City of Dust' text, click advances/closes
M key toggles mirror-lens-button active styling (border-amber-400/70 text-amber-200)
J key navigates to /journal/1 with journal-prompt and journal-input
journal-save-button persists to localStorage under heartbound.save.v1 and navigates to /map
Ch3 Tara dialogue sequence -> 4 choice buttons (choice-deny/joke/bargain/honest) appear
choice-honest -> outcome -> end narration -> auto-nav to /journal/3
Threshold screen reached via /journal/5; renders 'The first threshold has opened.' h1
Continue button enabled after completedChapters present; navigates to /game/<currentChapter>
